channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Mysterious Spheres Wash Up On Australian Beach, Could Be Rocket 'Space Balls'

media:content.media:description: The agency is continuing its investigation in coordination with emergency management authorities.

item.description: Reports showed the objects, washed up on beaches in the Forrest Beach area of Townsville, appeared to be large spheres.
item.content:encoded: Reports showed the objects, washed up on beaches in the Forrest Beach area of Townsville, appeared to be large spheres.

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral News Updates: Iran Begins Ali Khamenei's Funeral Procession through Tehran

media:content.media:description: Iran Former Supreme Leader's Khamenei Funeral: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's remains arrived in Tehran today.

item.description: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace

item.title: 'Kill Trump' Calls At Ali Khamenei's Funeral As Top Leaders Reemerge From Hiding

media:content.media:description: People chanted, "Death to America" and "Death to Israel," as they called for revenge.

item.description: Posters and graffiti at the Grand Mosalla even called for the assassination of Trump and Netanyahu, with similar slogans echoing the crowd.
item.content:encoded: Posters and graffiti at the Grand Mosalla even called for the assassination of Trump and Netanyahu, with similar slogans echoing the crowd.

item.title: 'Death To America, Death To Israel' Chants Echo At Khamenei's Funeral In Iran

media:content.media:description: The funeral was delayed as the war raged

item.description: The comment represents the first, direct call for Trump's death by an emcee at the funeral, which has seen posters and graffiti calling for the killing of Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
item.content:encoded: The comment represents the first, direct call for Trump's death by an emcee at the funeral, which has seen posters and graffiti calling for the killing of Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

item.title: Zelesky Says Fight Continuing In Key Town That Kremlin Says It Seized

media:content.media:description: Kostyantynivka had some 78,000 inhabitants before Russia invaded in 2022.

item.description: Moscow earlier this week announced it had taken the key eastern town of Kostyantynivka but Kyiv has denied that as a "lie", saying that it is defending the town.
item.content:encoded: Moscow earlier this week announced it had taken the key eastern town of Kostyantynivka but Kyiv has denied that as a "lie", saying that it is defending the town.

item.title: JD Vance's US "Only Ally" Remark, Netanyahu's "1.4 Billion Indians" Reply

media:content.media:description: Netanyahu said Israel has India's support.

item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Bejamin Netanyahu has pushed back against JD Vance's comments, saying that his country gets "tremendous" support from India.
item.content:encoded: Israeli Prime Minister Bejamin Netanyahu has pushed back against JD Vance's comments, saying that his country gets "tremendous" support from India.

item.title: Trump To Meet Zelesnsky, Syrian President At NATO Summit In Turkey

media:content.media:description: Both Putin and Zelensky spoke by phone with Trump on Saturday in calls.

item.description: Trump's meeting with Volodymyr Zelensky in Ankara comes amid growing efforts to end the invasion of Ukraine that Russia launched nearly four-and-a-half years ago.
item.content:encoded: Trump's meeting with Volodymyr Zelensky in Ankara comes amid growing efforts to end the invasion of Ukraine that Russia launched nearly four-and-a-half years ago.

item.title: In "Businesslike" Putin Call, Trump Offers To Help End Ukraine War, Again

media:content.media:description: Zelensky said he had also held a "very good call" with Trump on Saturday.

item.description: The call, their fourth this year, took place just before a significant NATO summit in Turkey, due to begin on Tuesday and expected to be attended by Trump.
item.content:encoded: The call, their fourth this year, took place just before a significant NATO summit in Turkey, due to begin on Tuesday and expected to be attended by Trump.

item.title: Iran's "No History" Reply To Trump's "One Shot" Threat Amid Khamenei Funeral

media:content.media:description: Iran said Trump and the US can kill people, but not ideals.

item.description: Iran's reaction followed a remark made by Trump, who claimed that the US has the capabilities to take out Iran's surviving top leadership "all in one shot" as they gathered to mourn late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
item.content:encoded: Iran's reaction followed a remark made by Trump, who claimed that the US has the capabilities to take out Iran's surviving top leadership "all in one shot" as they gathered to mourn late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Skydiver Carrying US Flag Crashes Into Tent After Mid-Air Landing Incident

media:content.media:description: Skydiver lost control and fell face-first into a vendor tent.

item.description: Despite the dramatic landing, organisers said that the man escaped with only minor injuries and did not need hospital treatment.
item.content:encoded: Despite the dramatic landing, organisers said that the man escaped with only minor injuries and did not need hospital treatment.

item.title: Japan Space Probe Performs Flyby Of Asteroid. It May Help Protect The Earth

media:content.media:description: Online footage supplied by JAXA showed scientists applauding in a control room.

item.description: Moving at a speed of more than 18,000 kilometres per hour, Hayabusa2 was not intended to collide with Torifune.
item.content:encoded: Moving at a speed of more than 18,000 kilometres per hour, Hayabusa2 was not intended to collide with Torifune.

item.title: 8, Including 4 Children, Injured In New York Shooting On US Independence Day

media:content.media:description: The four children shot are ages 6, 7, 12 and 14. (Representational Image))

item.description: One of the victims, a 21-year-old woman, was in critical condition while the others were described as being stable and expected to survive, police said.
item.content:encoded: One of the victims, a 21-year-old woman, was in critical condition while the others were described as being stable and expected to survive, police said.

item.title: Seven-Year-Old In US Critically Injured In Horrific Dog Attack: 'Scalp Ripped Off'

media:content.media:description: She is now recovering at home.

item.description: The family described the girl as "an incredibly strong little girl, and her resilience is inspiring everyone around her".
item.content:encoded: The family described the girl as "an incredibly strong little girl, and her resilience is inspiring everyone around her".

item.title: Boy, 11, To Face Trial For Shopping Plaza Fire Which Killed 72 In Pakistan

media:content.media:description: The inferno gutted the Gul Plaza shopping plaza on Karachi's famous M A Jinnah Road

item.description: An 11-year-old boy will stand trial after being named as an accused in the chargesheet filed by police related to the fire incident that killed 72 people at a shopping complex in Pakistan's Karachi in January.
item.content:encoded: An 11-year-old boy will stand trial after being named as an accused in the chargesheet filed by police related to the fire incident that killed 72 people at a shopping complex in Pakistan's Karachi in January.

item.title: Gwadar Explained: Why Pak's Chinese-Backed Port Keeps Coming Under Attack

media:content.media:description: China developed Gwadar Port as a strategic and commercial hub under its Belt and Road Initiative. (File)

item.description: For the people of Gwadar, stability isn't an abstract goal. It's the chance to send a child to school without worrying about a sudden deadline of violence
item.content:encoded: For the people of Gwadar, stability isn't an abstract goal. It's the chance to send a child to school without worrying about a sudden deadline of violence

item.title: China's New Ethnic Unity Law Raises Alarm Over Overseas Crackdown

media:content.media:description: China's National People's Congress passed the law on March 12.

item.description: The law legally consolidates President Xi Jinping's constant efforts to establish a national identity and promote the idea of a single "Chinese nation".
item.content:encoded: The law legally consolidates President Xi Jinping's constant efforts to establish a national identity and promote the idea of a single "Chinese nation".

item.title: From Zia To 'Holy War', State Policy Built Pak's Extremist Ecosystem

media:content.media:description: Terror assembled by deliberate design cannot be credibly disowned onto a neighbour

item.description: Pakistan treats radicalisation as something that happened to Pakistan rather than something the state itself cultivated
item.content:encoded: Pakistan treats radicalisation as something that happened to Pakistan rather than something the state itself cultivated

item.title: "Mentally Unstable": Government Sources Slam Pak's Khawaja Asif For Attack On PM Modi

media:content.media:description: Government sources said Pakistan's criticism reflected "envy" rather than facts.

item.description: The Seychelles government categorically rejected suggestions that the award was fabricated or created for PM Modi's visit.
item.content:encoded: The Seychelles government categorically rejected suggestions that the award was fabricated or created for PM Modi's visit.

item.title: Watch: Trump Displays One Of Oldest US Flags At 'America250' Event

media:content.media:description: Trump said the historic flags had witnessed some of the important moments in US history.

item.description: Unlike the well-known Betsy Ross flag, which has the stars arranged in a circle, this flag has the stars placed in three rows in a 4-5-4 pattern, Trump said.
item.content:encoded: Unlike the well-known Betsy Ross flag, which has the stars arranged in a circle, this flag has the stars placed in three rows in a 4-5-4 pattern, Trump said.

item.title: Ali Khamenei's 3 Sons Attend Funeral In Tehran, Successor Mojtaba Skips

media:content.media:description: The ceremonies will conclude on July 9, when Ali Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad

item.description: State television showed three of Ali Khamenei's sons, Mostafa, Meysam and Masoud Khamenei, standing behind their father's coffin during funeral prayers at Tehran's Imam Khomeini Grand Mosalla
item.content:encoded: State television showed three of Ali Khamenei's sons, Mostafa, Meysam and Masoud Khamenei, standing behind their father's coffin during funeral prayers at Tehran's Imam Khomeini Grand Mosalla
